title: paeonia fragrans
intro: Paeonia fragrans, also known as the sweet peony, is a flowering plant that belongs to the peony family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia fragrans include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Paeonia fragrans is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
